title: phlomoides tournefortii
intro: Phlomoides tournefortii, also known as Dalmatian sage or silver-leaved phlomis, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits. The plant's leaves and stems can be used to prepare herbal infusions and teas that may help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations often involve drying and infusing the leaves, or using them in the form of tinctures, capsules, or topical creams.
